summary: Completed comprehensive testing of VenuLoQ Phase 4 - Venue Manager Approval Surface on mobile viewport (390x844). Backend: 13/13 tests passed after fixing a bug. Frontend: All UI features verified working. Fixed backend bug where 'under_data_refinement' status change didn't require reason.

venue_manager_login.detail: venuemanager@venuloq.in / test123 logs in successfully with role 'venue_manager'

approval_blocked_by_hard_blockers.detail: POST /api/acquisitions/{acq_id}/status with 'approved' is BLOCKED when hard blockers exist (no photos)

send_back_with_reason_logs_history.detail: Successful send-back logs user/role/timestamp/reason in history

venue_manager_allowed_transitions.detail: Venue Manager can transition from awaiting_manager_approval to: approved, under_data_refinement, sent_back_to_specialist, rejected

history_audit_fields.detail: All status transitions log user/role/timestamp/reason in history

stats_summary_endpoint.detail: GET /api/acquisitions/stats/summary returns counts for manager-relevant statuses

venue_manager_login_redirect.detail: Venue Manager login redirects to /team/dashboard correctly

manager_queue_loads.detail: /team/field/approve loads Manager Approval Queue with data-testid='manager-queue'

queue_cards_display.detail: Cards show venue name, QUICK badge, REWORK badge, posture pills (Fields/Media/Commercial), 'No media' indicator

readiness_banner.detail: Readiness banner shows 'Hard Blockers' with red styling when blockers exist

posture_grid.detail: Posture grid shows Field Completeness, Media Quality, Commercial Summary, Publishability

approve_button_disabled.detail: Approve button is greyed/disabled when hard blockers exist

approve_button_toast_error.detail: Clicking Approve shows toast error 'Cannot approve — hard blockers remain' when blockers exist

send_back_modal.detail: Send Back modal has target selector (Data Team vs Specialist) with mandatory reason field

reject_modal.detail: Reject modal has mandatory reason field

action_bar_present.detail: Action bar shows Send Back, Approve, and Reject buttons

critical_code_review_comments: ManagerQueue.js: Well-structured mobile-first queue with tabs, posture pills, QUICK/REWORK badges, media indicator
ManagerApprovalDetail.js: Comprehensive approval detail with readiness banner, posture grid, collapsible sections, action modals with send-back target selector
acquisitions.py: Fixed bug where 'under_data_refinement' status change didn't require reason (line 529)
seed_data_creation: Used existing acquisition acq_36d4cdf690ec (Maharaja Palace) in awaiting_manager_approval status with hard blocker (no photos)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 4 Venue Manager Approval Surface fully tested. Routes: /team/field/approve (queue), /team/field/approve/{acqId} (detail). Venue Manager (venue_manager role) can: approve (blocked by hard blockers), send back to Data Team or Specialist (reason required), reject (reason required). Ven-Us Assist accessible by venue_manager. Approval logs venus_posture_at_decision in history. Fixed backend bug: 'under_data_refinement' now requires reason.

bug_fixed.issue: Send back to Data Team (under_data_refinement) didn't require reason
bug_fixed.fix: Added 'under_data_refinement' to the list of statuses that require reason
